violations.text: Establishment does not have an individual with the Rhode Island Manager Certified In Food Safety license. Application provided during time of inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2024
The hand-washing sink in the warewashing area was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2025
Air mattress observed in basement area. PIC informed to cease practice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2025
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2025
Chest freezer (lid with exposed insulation) in basement area was not in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the freezers have an accumulation of ice and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2025
Opening was observed by staircase to basement. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2025
Establishment has 2 serv-safe must need to be registered with the RIDOH. Application given to Owner. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2024

Tamales and soup were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2024
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2024

Wood is used in the construction of table in the dishwasher area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2024
Clear plastic blender observed in poor repair cracked. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the freezer have an accumulation of ice build. New Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2024
